turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 88-6873, Clemons against Mississippi will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: For the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Clerk, we vacate and remand the decision of the Supreme Court of Mississippi in this case. Justices Brennan and Blackmun have each filed an opinion concurring in part and dissenting in part; Justices Brennan, Marshall, and Stevens join Justice Blackmun’s opinion.
